rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place component type annexes in the component type scope and implementation annexes in the implementation scope
Use visible identifiers from the current AADL model, not case-specific names
Preserve existing AADL structure and connections when inserting annex blocks
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when inserting annex blocks
Use only visible identifiers from the current AADL model
Preserve existing AADL structure and connections
Place component type annexes in the component type scope and implementation annexes in the implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for the properties
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
